toolManifests.name: StockLLM research
toolManifests.runtimeUse: Reference material for explanation/coaching pipelines, not authoritative legal move generation.
toolManifests.notes: Legal move generation remains deterministic; LLM-style outputs can explain moves after rules validation.

toolManifests.name: Stockfish source
toolManifests.runtimeUse: Generate best-move labels, tactical ground truth, and benchmark suites outside the browser.
toolManifests.notes: Source archive is not committed; use prepared Stockfish browser assets for runtime and this archive for deeper offline builds.

toolManifests.name: Aix chess data tools
toolManifests.runtimeUse: Offline querying and normalization of large Lichess/Aix data before compact AllChess knowledge generation.
toolManifests.notes: Pair with Aix-compatible Parquet datasets; do not ship raw query tooling to the browser.

toolManifests.name: Lc0 ONNX DirectML
toolManifests.runtimeUse: Offline neural policy/value labeling and comparison against Stockfish lines.
toolManifests.notes: Windows binary/tooling should stay local or in R2; browser gameplay should consume distilled labels, not the executable.

toolManifests.name: NNUE tools
toolManifests.runtimeUse: Offline feature extraction, experiment tracking, and evaluation graph generation.
toolManifests.notes: Use for long-running training jobs; generated manifests and metrics can be stored in D1/R2.
